## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] E2E test passes (run from the quark runtime repo: `make test-e2e`)
- [ ] Public API is not broken (or this is a major version bump)
- [ ] No internal implementation classes exported from `index.ts`
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies added (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md, `docs/*.mdx`) where relevant
- [ ] Changes are scoped — no unrelated files in this PR
